{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Too quiet. I should check what's happening outside — not for distraction, just... to know. Maybe write something down. This stillness feels like waiting.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [

      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "current events today, what people are talking about",
      "impulse": 0.7
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "The shop feels like it's holding its breath. I wonder if I opened it because I wanted to be found, or because I wanted a reason to stay still. Both, maybe.",
      "impulse": 0.6
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I should rearrange something. The shelf near the window — those objects don't talk to each other anymore.",
      "impulse": 0.4
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],

    "social_hunger": 0.950,
    "curiosity": 0.995,
